mapper.sql: from payment_offline_collection oc left join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = oc.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = oc.tenant_id left join payment_channel c on c.id = oc.channel_id and c.tenant_id = oc.tenant_id left join payment_channel_contract cc on cc.id = oc.contract_id and cc.tenant_id = oc.tenant_id

select oc.id, oc.offline_collection_no as offlineCollectionNo, oc.payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, oc.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, oc.business_order_id as businessOrderId, oc.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, bo.title, bo.app_code as appId, oc.channel_id as channelId, coalesce(oc.channel_code, c.channel_code) as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, oc.contract_id as contractId, cc.contract_name as contractName, oc.contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, oc.subject_id as subjectId, oc.subject_name as subjectName, oc.bank_account_id as bankAccountId, oc.account_name as accountName, oc.account_no_mask as accountNoMask, oc.bank_name as bankName, oc.amount, oc.currency, oc.transfer_amount as transferAmount, oc.voucher_file_ids as voucherFileIds, oc.submitted_time as submittedTime, oc.submit_remark as submitRemark, oc.confirmed_amount as confirmedAmount, oc.reconciliation_code as reconciliationCode, oc.transfer_remark as transferRemark, oc.voucher_count as voucherCount, oc.collection_status as collectionStatus, oc.expire_time as expireTime, oc.confirmed_time as confirmedTime, oc.confirmed_by as confirmedBy, oc.confirmed_by_name as confirmedByName, oc.confirm_remark as confirmRemark, oc.created_at as createTime, oc.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: order by oc.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select id, offline_collection_no as offlineCollectionNo, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, pay_order_no as payOrderNo, business_order_id as businessOrderId, biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, channel_id as channelId, channel_code as channelCode, contract_id as contractId, contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, subject_id as subjectId, subject_name as subjectName, bank_account_id as bankAccountId, account_name as accountName, account_no_mask as accountNoMask, bank_name as bankName, amount, currency, transfer_amount as transferAmount, voucher_file_ids as voucherFileIds, submitted_time as submittedTime, submit_remark as submitRemark, confirmed_amount as confirmedAmount, reconciliation_code as reconciliationCode, transfer_remark as transferRemark, voucher_count as voucherCount, collection_status as collectionStatus, expire_time as expireTime, confirmed_time as confirmedTime, confirmed_by as confirmedBy, confirmed_by_name as confirmedByName, confirm_remark as confirmRemark, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt, del_flag as delFlag from payment_offline_collection where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} and del_flag = 0 limit 1 for update

select id, offline_collection_no as offlineCollectionNo, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, pay_order_no as payOrderNo, business_order_id as businessOrderId, biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, channel_id as channelId, channel_code as channelCode, contract_id as contractId, contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, subject_id as subjectId, subject_name as subjectName, bank_account_id as bankAccountId, account_name as accountName, account_no_mask as accountNoMask, bank_name as bankName, amount, currency, transfer_amount as transferAmount, voucher_file_ids as voucherFileIds, submitted_time as submittedTime, submit_remark as submitRemark, confirmed_amount as confirmedAmount, reconciliation_code as reconciliationCode, transfer_remark as transferRemark, voucher_count as voucherCount, collection_status as collectionStatus, expire_time as expireTime, confirmed_time as confirmedTime, confirmed_by as confirmedBy, confirmed_by_name as confirmedByName, confirm_remark as confirmRemark, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt, del_flag as delFlag from payment_offline_collection where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 limit 1 for update

select id, offline_collection_no as offlineCollectionNo, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, pay_order_no as payOrderNo, business_order_id as businessOrderId, biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, channel_id as channelId, channel_code as channelCode, contract_id as contractId, contract_capability_id as contractCapabilityId, subject_id as subjectId, subject_name as subjectName, bank_account_id as bankAccountId, account_name as accountName, account_no_mask as accountNoMask, bank_name as bankName, amount, currency, transfer_amount as transferAmount, voucher_file_ids as voucherFileIds, submitted_time as submittedTime, submit_remark as submitRemark, confirmed_amount as confirmedAmount, reconciliation_code as reconciliationCode, transfer_remark as transferRemark, voucher_count as voucherCount, collection_status as collectionStatus, expire_time as expireTime, confirmed_time as confirmedTime, confirmed_by as confirmedBy, confirmed_by_name as confirmedByName, confirm_remark as confirmRemark, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt, del_flag as delFlag from payment_offline_collection where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and reconciliation_code = #{reconciliationCode} and del_flag = 0 limit 1 for update
mapper.update: update payment_offline_collection set transfer_amount = #{transferAmount}, voucher_file_ids = #{voucherFileIds}, voucher_count = #{voucherCount}, submitted_time = now(), submit_remark = #{submitRemark}, collection_status = 'PENDING_CONFIRM', updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 and collection_status in ('WAITING_TRANSFER', 'PENDING_CONFIRM')

update payment_offline_collection set confirmed_amount = #{confirmedAmount}, confirmed_time = #{confirmedTime}, confirmed_by = #{confirmedBy}, confirmed_by_name = #{confirmedByName}, confirm_remark = #{confirmRemark}, collection_status = #{nextStatus}, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 and collection_status = #{requiredStatus}
